x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: cause_notes, fix_notes, and workaround are the structured fields Now Assist reads for problem summaries and KB article generation. High missing rates are critical gaps for AI summarization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make Cause Notes and Fix Notes mandatory on problem closure (exclude Cancelled and Duplicate close codes). Configure a closure information mandatory UI policy. Workaround is informational only — it is only required when a workaround was actively used.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[cause_notes, fix_notes, and workaround are the structured fields Now Assist reads for problem summaries and KB article generation. High missing rates are critical gaps for AI summarization.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>RCA Field Population Rate</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var totalGr = new GlideAggregate("problem");
    totalGr.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
    totalGr.addAggregate("COUNT");
    totalGr.query();
    var total = totalGr.next() ? parseInt(totalGr.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable",
            actualValue: "No closed/resolved problem records found (state IN 3,4)",
            finding: "No qualifying closed problem records found. RCA field population cannot be assessed." };
    }

    // Use addNullQuery -- correct API for IS EMPTY on GlideAggregate.
    // addQuery(field, "") treats empty string as literal value and returns 0
    // for rich text (HTML) fields like cause_notes and fix_notes.
    var missingCause = 0;
    try {
        var rcaGA1 = new GlideAggregate("problem");
        rcaGA1.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
        rcaGA1.addNullQuery("cause_notes");
        rcaGA1.addAggregate("COUNT");
        rcaGA1.query();
        missingCause = rcaGA1.next() ? parseInt(rcaGA1.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0 : 0;
    } catch(e1) {}

    var missingFix = 0;
    try {
        var rcaGA2 = new GlideAggregate("problem");
        rcaGA2.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
        rcaGA2.addNullQuery("fix_notes");
        rcaGA2.addAggregate("COUNT");
        rcaGA2.query();
        missingFix = rcaGA2.next() ? parseInt(rcaGA2.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0 : 0;
    } catch(e2) {}

    var missingWorkaround = 0;
    try {
        var rcaGA3 = new GlideAggregate("problem");
        rcaGA3.addQuery("state", "IN", "3,4");
        rcaGA3.addNullQuery("work_around");
        rcaGA3.addAggregate("COUNT");
        rcaGA3.query();
        missingWorkaround = rcaGA3.next() ? parseInt(rcaGA3.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0 : 0;
    } catch(e3) {}

    var causePct    = Math.round(((total - missingCause)    / total) * 100);
    var fixPct      = Math.round(((total - missingFix)      / total) * 100);
    var workarndPct = Math.round(((total - missingWorkaround) / total) * 100);
    // Score only on cause_notes and fix_notes -- workaround is informational
    var worstPct = Math.min(causePct, fixPct);

    var actualValue = total + " closed/resolved problems | " +
        "Cause Notes: " + causePct + "% populated | " +
        "Fix Notes: " + fixPct + "% populated | " +
        "Workaround: " + workarndPct + "% (informational only)";

    if (worstPct >= 80) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "RCA fields well populated. Cause Notes: " + causePct + "%, Fix Notes: " + fixPct + "%. Strong signal for Now Assist problem summarization and KB article generation." };
    } else if (worstPct >= 50) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Partial RCA population (Cause: " + causePct + "%, Fix: " + fixPct + "%, target: 80%+). Now Assist will rely on unstructured work notes for gaps -- enforce RCA field population at problem close." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "RCA critically underpopulated (Cause: " + causePct + "%, Fix: " + fixPct + "%). Now Assist problem summarization lacks structured resolution context -- most AI summaries will use unstructured work notes only." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005971</number>
<order>320</order>
<remediation_guidance>Make Cause Notes and Fix Notes mandatory on problem closure (exclude Cancelled and Duplicate close codes). Configure a closure information mandatory UI policy. Workaround is informational only — it is only required when a workaround was actively used.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
